lua.indexing: 1-based throughout: pools and node ids. 0 is the "none" sentinel (parent of root, absent text/modifiers/children).
lua.pools: kinds[i], strings[i], modifiers[i], diagnosticCategories[i] map id -> name.
lua.nodeLayout: Per-file struct-of-arrays. For node id n in file F: F.nodes.kind[n], F.nodes.start[n], etc.

fields.text: string pool id, or 0 if the node has no literal text
fields.modifiers: array of modifier pool ids, or 0 if none
fields.children: array of child node ids, or 0 if none
fields.parent: parent node id, or 0 for the root
